name: Inroom Modular Suppression System (KRPS) — 10 kg
shortDescription: Ceiling-mounted, panel-controlled room flooding system with cross-zone smoke and heat detection.
longDescription: Where a total flooding system's floor-space and structural requirements aren't practical, the Kanex Room Protection System (KRPS) delivers the same automatic, whole-room response from ceiling-mounted modular containers instead. Smoke and heat detectors report to a programmed master control panel; a cross-zonal function requires two or more detectors in the same zone to agree before the system arms, cutting false activations. Once triggered, a strobe and siren sound to allow evacuation before the agent discharges and floods the room. A manual release (or abort) switch keeps the whole system under operator control when needed. Sized for server rooms, electrical switching rooms and other spaces that can't accommodate structural modification.

images.alt: Inroom Modular Suppression System (KRPS) — 10 kg supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Detection
specs.value: Smoke detector + heat detector, cross-zonal logic

specs.label: Components
specs.value: Modular extinguisher, detectors, master control panel, manual release, hooter with strobe
